attributes.action: Give all Homeless UK citizens a room in a hotel whilst processing housing claim.
attributes.additional_details: I feel that as homelessness is on the rise in the UK and many homeless violence on the streets, that is the very least the goverment can do to provide them shelter and the ability to seek work and attend interviews with dignity until they can be housed.
attributes.background: I feel it is the governments duty to afford Homeless UK citizens the dignity and safety if a hotel room until their housing claim has been processed and they are in suitable accommodation.

rejection.details:
National rough sleeping programme: permanent, safe accommodation and support
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/747196
